If you are interested, please don't hesitate to contact me..."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T08:34:34+0000", "from": {"id": "2328673307164254", "name": "Pavel Curda"}, "id": "552180764805263_552185334804806", "message": "Vojto - tak nejake use-cases od GD co se vali na webu ... ja nic nemuzu vyguglit...dik"}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T08:47:55+0000", "from": {"id": "1470691262991892", "name": "Vojta Roček"}, "id": "552180764805263_552189318137741", "message": "Taky mivam problem tam neco najit, co treba http://www.gooddata.com/files/uploads/pandora.pdf , http://www.gooddata.com/wp-content/uploads/poweredby/poweredby_advantix.pdf , http://www.gooddata.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/08/enterasys.pdf ?
Hrozne rad bych hodil nase use-cases na Avast, Slevomat nebo OKIN tady v CR, ale netusim jak jsou dohodla publikacni prava a ze zkusenosti z USA vim, ze to obcas byva opravdu slozite."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T09:01:21+0000", "from": {"id": "2067876499947603", "name": "Daniel Šťastný"}, "id": "552180764805263_552192008137472", "message": "Vojto, znáš třeba http://www.microsoft.com/en-us/bi/powerpivot.aspx ? - když se dobře nastaví, může to být velmi silný nástroj, defacto volně dostupný. Je to lepší protipříklad ke GD, než Excel samotný."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T09:25:43+0000", "from": {"id": "1470691262991892", "name": "Vojta Roček"}, "id": "552180764805263_552196811470325", "message": "Jasne. Konkurence je spousty.
Pokud se bavime jenom o zpracovavani dat, seznam bude nekonecny a kazdy tyden tam pribudou tri nove kousky. 
Nemusime to delas s GoodData, pointa je ze my z mnoha duvodu chceme. Treba v uzivatelske privetivosti a rychlosti nasazeni jsem zatim nevidel nic, co by zvladalo aspon podobne objemy dat se stejnou slozitosti vypoctu.
Udelal bych nejaky maly hackaton, pozval jeste nekoho s Tableau a QlikView, nadefinujeme nejake questy (od loadu dat az po nejake vysledky) a muzeme pomerit sily - rad se necham poucit! :)"}], "paging": {"cursors": {"after": "WTI5dGJXVnVkRjlqZAFhKemIzSTZAOVFV5TVRrMk9ERXhORGN3TXpJMU9qWXhORFUyTnpjPQZDZD", "before": "WTI5dGJXVnVkRjlqZAFhKemIzSTZAOVFV5TVRneE1qRXhORGN4T0RnMU9qWXhORFUxTlRBPQZDZD"}}}, "id": "177057932317550_614877850089204"}, {"id": "177057932317550_548905048466168"}], "paging": {"cursors": {"after": "", "before": ""}, "next": "https://graph.facebook.com/v23.0/177057932317550/feed?limit=25&fields=comments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%2Ccomments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%7D%7D&access_token=token&", "previous": "https://graph.facebook.com/v23.0/177057932317550/feed?limit=25&fields=comments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%2Ccomments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%7D%7D&access_token=token&"}}

THX"}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T08:27:57+0000", "from": {"id": "1470691262991892", "name": "Vojta Roček"}, "id": "552180764805263_552182778138395", "message": "Pavel Curda We would love to, but we can't show work we done for our clients. However we can make POC for any use-case in matter of days and it will be based on your data.
If you are interested, please don't hesitate to contact me..."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T08:34:34+0000", "from": {"id": "2328673307164254", "name": "Pavel Curda"}, "id": "552180764805263_552185334804806", "message": "Vojto - tak nejake use-cases od GD co se vali na webu ... ja nic nemuzu vyguglit...dik"}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T08:47:55+0000", "from": {"id": "1470691262991892", "name": "Vojta Roček"}, "id": "552180764805263_552189318137741", "message": "Taky mivam problem tam neco najit, co treba http://www.gooddata.com/files/uploads/pandora.pdf , http://www.gooddata.com/wp-content/uploads/poweredby/poweredby_advantix.pdf , http://www.gooddata.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/08/enterasys.pdf ?
Hrozne rad bych hodil nase use-cases na Avast, Slevomat nebo OKIN tady v CR, ale netusim jak jsou dohodla publikacni prava a ze zkusenosti z USA vim, ze to obcas byva opravdu slozite."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T09:01:21+0000", "from": {"id": "2067876499947603", "name": "Daniel Šťastný"}, "id": "552180764805263_552192008137472", "message": "Vojto, znáš třeba http://www.microsoft.com/en-us/bi/powerpivot.aspx ? - když se dobře nastaví, může to být velmi silný nástroj, defacto volně dostupný. Je to lepší protipříklad ke GD, než Excel samotný."}, {"created_time": "2013-05-02T09:25:43+0000", "from": {"id": "1470691262991892", "name": "Vojta Roček"}, "id": "552180764805263_552196811470325", "message": "Jasne. Konkurence je spousty.
Pokud se bavime jenom o zpracovavani dat, seznam bude nekonecny a kazdy tyden tam pribudou tri nove kousky. 
Nemusime to delas s GoodData, pointa je ze my z mnoha duvodu chceme. Treba v uzivatelske privetivosti a rychlosti nasazeni jsem zatim nevidel nic, co by zvladalo aspon podobne objemy dat se stejnou slozitosti vypoctu.
Udelal bych nejaky maly hackaton, pozval jeste nekoho s Tableau a QlikView, nadefinujeme nejake questy (od loadu dat az po nejake vysledky) a muzeme pomerit sily - rad se necham poucit! :)"}], "paging": {"cursors": {"after": "WTI5dGJXVnVkRjlqZAFhKemIzSTZAOVFV5TVRrMk9ERXhORGN3TXpJMU9qWXhORFUyTnpjPQZDZD", "before": "WTI5dGJXVnVkRjlqZAFhKemIzSTZAOVFV5TVRneE1qRXhORGN4T0RnMU9qWXhORFUxTlRBPQZDZD"}}}, "id": "177057932317550_614877850089204"}, {"id": "177057932317550_548905048466168"}], "paging": {"cursors": {"after": "", "before": ""}, "next": "https://graph.facebook.com/v23.0/177057932317550/feed?limit=25&fields=comments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%7D&access_token=token&", "previous": "https://graph.facebook.com/v23.0/177057932317550/feed?limit=25&fields=comments%7Bmessage%2Ccreated_time%2Cfrom%7D&access_token=token&"}}
